transcription.text: Hi, this is Sarah from Greenfield Auto. I'm calling with the estimate on your Jeep Wrangler. Oh hey, what did you find? So the front axle U-joints are shot and the track bar bushing is worn out. U-joints are $380 for both sides with labor. Track bar bushing is $220. Total comes to $600 before tax. Hmm, that's more than I expected. Can I get back to you? Of course, take your time. The estimate is good for 30 days.
transcription.summary:
